text: Had the opportunity to participate in #AWSCommunityDay. An enriching experience where I met people with great industry expertise and took away valuable learnings. Excited to keep joining events that contribute to our community and professional growth.

My portfolio is now live! After a lot of work, I launched my site built with React and Tailwind CSS — sharing who I am, my work experience, education and how to contact me. Open to new opportunities and connections!

New achievement unlocked! Completed the "Club Java Master - Novato a Experto Java +110hrs" course on Udemy. 110+ hours deepening my Java and Spring Boot skills — from fundamentals to advanced concepts, OOP, design patterns and code optimization.
